2606.21262.title: ARCO: Adaptive Rubric with Co-Evolution for Multi-Step LLM-Based Agents
2606.21262.paper_summary: Reinforcement learning for multi-step LLM agents often relies on scalar rewards that indicate success but cannot explain why a trajectory is good or bad. Rubric-based rewards improve interpretability through natural-language criteria, but existing methods score at the trajectory level and freeze the scorer behind a closed-source judge, leaving step-level credit assignment unresolved and the judge itself static. We propose ARCO (Adaptive Rubric CO-evolution), a rubric framework in which a same-scale model $μ$ shares a backbone with two heads: a generation head that produces per-step criteria, and a score head that predicts rubric-conditioned step-level rewards. A trajectory decomposition constraint ties the sum of step rewards to the terminal outcome, enabling credit assignment without step-level labels, while $μ$ and the policy $π$ are jointly updated on on-policy data so that the rubric content and the scoring function co-evolve at the parameter level. Across HotpotQA, 2WikiMultiHopQA, and MuSiQue with two open-source backbones, ARCO improves the best EM in every setting over strong outcome-, rubric-, and process-reward baselines, and analyses show that its rubrics are step-specific, robust to design choices, and useful for diagnosing agent behavior. Codes and data are available at https://github.com/zihangtian/ARCO.
2606.21262.paper_summary_zh: 強化學習對於多步驟 LLM 代理通常依賴於指示成功的標量獎勵，但無法解釋為什麼一條軌跡是好或壞的。基於評分標準的獎勵通過自然語言標準提高了解釋性，但現有方法在軌跡層面進行評分，並將評分者固定在一個封閉源的評判者後面，留下步驟級別的信用分配未解決，評判者本身也保持靜態。我們提出了 ARCO（自適應評分標準共同演化），這是一個評分標準框架，其中一個同尺度模型 $μ$ 與兩個頭部共享主幹：一個生成頭部產生每步的標準，另一個評分頭部預測基於評分標準的步驟級獎勵。一個軌跡分解約束將步驟獎勵的總和與終端結果聯繫起來，從而實現無步驟級標籤的信用分配，同時 $μ$ 和策略 $π$ 在策略數據上共同更新，以便評分標準內容和評分函數在參數層面共同演化。在 HotpotQA、2WikiMultiHopQA 和 MuSiQue 的兩個開源主幹上，ARCO 在每個設置中都改善了最佳 EM，超越了強大的結果、評分標準和過程獎勵基準，分析顯示其評分標準是步驟特定的，對設計選擇具有穩健性，並且對於診斷代理行為是有用的。代碼和數據可在 https://github.com/zihangtian/ARCO 獲得。
2606.21262.author: Zihang Tian et.al.
2606.21262.authors: Zihang Tian, Jingsen Zhang, Rui Li, Xiaohe Bo, Yuanzi Li, Xu Chen
